summary: Tested event tracking fixes for quick-send flows. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). The fix correctly routes event tracking through /contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/events (instead of broken /messages/send/{userId} endpoint) and the find-or-create-and-log endpoint. Performance dashboard correctly aggregates events from contact_events collection.

frontend_tests.quick_send_digitalcard: PASSED - Form accepts first/last name, phone; Preview button works; Contact matching works
frontend_tests.quick_send_review: PASSED - Send Review Link form works correctly
frontend_tests.quick_send_showcase: PASSED - Share Showcase form works correctly

1_event_logging_via_contacts_events: Events include: event_type, title, description, channel, category, icon, color
2_find_or_create_and_log: POST /api/contacts/{userId}/find-or-create-and-log - creates new contact and logs event
Used for showcase sharing (more.tsx) and touchpoints fallback
3_performance_dashboard_integration: GET /api/tasks/{userId}/performance - returns total_touchpoints, sharing, communication, engagement
4_thread_tsx_fix: thread/[id].tsx line 667: fetch URL includes conversation_id
5_code_verification: more.tsx lines 284, 306, 328, 351: uses find-or-create-and-log for showcase/birthday

seed_data_creation: Multiple test events logged to contact_events collection during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event tracking fix verified: quick-send flows (digitalcard, review, showcase) now correctly log events via /contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/events instead of the broken /messages/send/{userId} endpoint. The performance dashboard at GET /tasks/{userId}/performance correctly counts these events in the sharing section. Thread personal SMS also fixed with conversation_id in URL. Touchpoints and more.tsx use find-or-create-and-log for fallback event logging.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS won't actually send, but event logging API is called before native app opens

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: quick-send flow was calling /messages/send/{userId} (missing conversation_id path param) resulting in 404 errors caught silently by .catch()
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed to /contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/events which directly inserts into contact_events collection - the same collection the performance dashboard queries
rca_of_the_issue.impact: Events from Share My Card, Review Link, Send a Card, My Showcase tiles now properly credited in performance dashboard
